serviceNotes.engine oil: N54 twin-turbo DI; CBS MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum oil service (SIB B000214). REC 10,000 km oil for enthusiastic use.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: air filter every third engine oil service (3 × 30,000 km CBS ceiling).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km: BMW E90 335i xDrive / xi spark plug rows specify replacement with every second engine oil service (2 × 30,000 km) per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: N54 DI + potential injector/carbon issues; intake walnut clean commonly recommended ~120,000 km.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — air filter each third engine oil change
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — 335i xDrive/xi: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling); RWD 335i follows same table row grouping
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS); 30,000 km planning
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS); 30,000 km planning
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — every second oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E90; REC ~120,000 km
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo specialist consensus; not a fixed BMW MFR km in CBS consumer table
